escalateWhen: verifyBeforeNext fails twice on same item after one Composer fix
item touches functions/src/, firestore.rules, or delivery CF logic — Sonnet 4.6 security-review Task before push
T2+ auth/Firestore writes or idempotency changes
scope blocked without listed schema/rules change — mark blocked, do not widen
